prompt: Replace the boat background with an alien spaceship cockpit, preserving character positions.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the entire boat background, including the mast on the left, the railings, and the sky/sea, with an alien spaceship cockpit. Also, preserve the speech bubble, its text, and the "THE NEXT MORNING..." text at the top left, ensuring they remain overlaid on the new spaceship environment.
objects: text "STEVE. OH STEVE, GRAMPS WANTS TO SEE YOU. COME ABOARD."
